title: Spell of Pnouthis for Acquiring an Assistant Daimon
notes: A ritual for acquiring a personal assistant daimon (paredros). The assistant daimon serves as a guide, messenger, and helper in magical operations. This is the foundational daimon-contact spell in the PGM corpus — the practitioner establishes an ongoing relationship with a daimonic helper.

catalog_entry.title: Spell of Pnouthis for acquiring an assistant daimon
